prestazioni: Engine swap to Renault-Nissan H4Mt 1.3L turbo (HR13DDT) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and Garrett GT2260S turbocharger, supporting 280hp/320Nm on E85 fuel with a custom ECU tune via Syvecs S6Plus standalone management

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (front), custom 3.92:1 final drive ratio (OEM Duster 4x4 housing), and uprated driveshafts with CV joints from a Renault Mégane RS Trophy-R for durability under high torque

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Duster chassis), polyamide bushings (SuperPro 69-4101-00) for subframe and control arms, and custom 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars (Eibach Pro-Street S)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Liberty Walk LB-DUSTER kit (carbon fiber fenders, extended rocker panels) with integrated air vents for brake cooling, paired with a custom front splitter (Rocket Bunny-style) in 3K twill carbon fiber

Full interior overhaul: Recaro Sportster CS seats (retrimmed in Alcantara with red stitching), custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) by Custom Cages UK, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub

Exterior lighting: Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs (OEM+), custom LED DRLs integrated into the front bumper (Lux H8 Angel Eyes), and a rear light delete with sequential LED taillights (Vland VLAND-001) for a modern JDM-inspired look
